page_metadata.biotools__summary: Quadratic, iterative, K-mer based reconstruction technique that utilizes sparsity promoting ideas from the field of compressed sensing to reconstruct the composition of a bacterial community (when the input data is 454-like pyrosequencing data).
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Quadratic, iterative, K-mer based reconstruction technique that utilizes sparsity promoting ideas from the field of compressed sensing to reconstruct the composition of a bacterial community (when the input data is 454-like pyrosequencing data).
